# Predict-then-Optimize {#sec-predict-optimize}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Understand the predict-then-optimize pipeline: ML forecast → OR decision
- Implement the newsvendor problem with ML-predicted demand
- Apply the SPO+ loss function to train forecasting models that minimize decision cost, not prediction error
- Compare standard MSE-trained vs. decision-aware trained models
:::

## Introduction

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
